verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin Egypt panin Abram, a zi, ama neih khempeuh, leh Lot zong tawh, Negeb gam lamah a paito hi
Abram in ganhing, ngun, leh kham hau mahmah hi
Amah Negeb gam pan kipanin Bethel ciangdong, a kipat cilin a puanbuk omnasa mun Bethel leh Ai kikal
a masa-a biakna tau khat a bawlnasa munah khualzinin a paisuak hi. Tua lai munah Abram in Topa' tungah thu a ngen hi
Abram tawh a paikhawm Lot in zong tuuhon, ganhon, leh puanbukte nei hi
Tua ahih manin mun khatah a tengkhawm dingin leitang in amaute gel vak zolo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau' gan neihsate tam mahmah ahih manin amaute gel tengkhawm theilo uh a
Abram' gancingte leh Lot' gancingte kitawng thei zel hi. Tua hun laitakin Kanaan mite leh Perez mite tua gamah teng lai uh hi
Tua ciangin Abram in Lot' kiangah, “Nang leh kei' kikal, nang' gancingte leh kei' gancingte' kikalah kitotna omsak kei ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh eite beh khat ihi hi

Na mai-ah gam buppi om hilo ahi hiam? Kei' kiang panin nangmah paikhia tawm in. Nang in veilam na lak leh, kei taklamah ka pai ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh zong, nang in taklam na lak leh, kei veilamah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi

Lot zong khuadak a, Jordan gun kuam mun khempeuh in limtakin tui ngahin Topa' huan hita leh, Zoar lama Egypt gam tawh hita leh kibang hi, ci-in mu hi. Hih pen Topa in Sodom leh Gomorrah a suksiat hun ma ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin Lot in ama-a' dingin Jordan gun kuam khempeuh teel a, nisuahna lamah a pai hi. Tua ahih manin amaute kikhen tuak uh hi
Kuam sunga khuapite' lakah Lot tengin, a puanbukte Sodom ciangdongah khinin a om laitakin Kanaan gam sungah Abram teng hi
Tua laitakin Sodom mite migilo hi a, Topa' tungah nakpi takin a khialte ahi hi
Ama kiang panin Lot a paikhiat khit ciangin Topa in Abram' kiangah, “Khuadak to in la, nangma omna panin leilu lam, leitaw lam, nisuahna lam, leh nitumna lam en in
Bang hang hiam cih leh na muh gam khempeuh nang leh na suanlekhakte kong pia paisuak ding hi
Na suanlekhakte, leitung leivui zahin tampi ka phasak ding hi. Mi khatpeuh in leitung leivui a sim theih leh na suanlekhakte zong kisim thei ding hi
Ding in la, gamdung gamvai kantanin pai in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang' tungah kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Abram in a puanbuk khinin, Hebron gamsung, Mamre tawsawte gei-ah hong pai-in a teng hi. Tua lai munah Topa-a' dingin biakna tau khat a bawl hi.
